title: FailureRecord
description: Structured failure record for the self-learning system. Replaces narrative failure-library entries. Source of truth for failure tracking, recurrence detection, and prevention artifact generation. Generic, product-agnostic.

failureId.description: Human-readable failure ID, format FAIL-YYYY-MM-DD-NNN. Used in the failure library and Fix-Agent output. Separate from the database row primary key (ULID, stored elsewhere).

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the failure was detected.

domain.description: Domain classification for pre-task retrieval matching. Implementations may constrain to a project-specific enum.

agentsInvolved.description: Generic agent roles involved in creating or detecting this failure.

files.description: File paths involved in the failure. Used for pre-task retrieval matching.

symptom.description: Observable symptom as seen by a user or QA (e.g., 'numeric field shows NaN').

failureClass.description: Categorical classification for recurrence detection and pattern matching.

severity.description: Severity level. P0 = user-facing, blocks release. P3 = cosmetic.

userImpact.description: Plain-English description of impact on the end user or downstream system.

recommendedPrevention.description: What should be done to prevent recurrence.

regressionTestAdded.description: Whether a regression test was added as part of the fix.

location.description: File path or identifier of the artifact.

preventionArtifacts.description: At least one prevention artifact is required for fix closure.

recurrenceCount.description: How many times this failure class has occurred. >=2 triggers auto-promotion. >=3 triggers benchmark addition. >=5 makes systemic-refactor-required unavoidable.

repeatOfFailureIds.description: References to prior FailureRecords of the same failure class.

rootCauseConfirmed.description: True if the root cause has been verified, not just hypothesized.

fixTag.description: Three-tag completion classification. Required for Fix-Agent close.

correlationId.description: Correlation ID linking to the session or event chain that surfaced this failure.
